## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and finalize contract terms for Zuplo's engagement with fwd.digital for SEO and content services.](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Agreement reached on a 6-month initial term with upfront payment, removing pilot period](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Target set for 2x organic traffic growth in US market within 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Zuplo to provide full access and minimize content publishing bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Pricing structure adjusted to balance fwd.digital's need for stability and Zuplo's desire for performance validation](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)

## Topics

### Contract Structure Adjustment

  - [Shifted from 3-month to 6-month initial term to address fwd.digital's stability concerns](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Removed pilot period, opting for immediate 6-month commitment](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Upfront payment for 6 months agreed upon, maintaining the offered discount](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Option to renew for additional 6 months with 30-day notice period at month 5](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)

### Performance Expectations and Milestones

  - [Current Zuplo US organic traffic: \~3.5K monthly visits](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Target set: 2x growth (to \~17K monthly US visits) within 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
  - [Benchmark competitors identified: Tyk, Gravitee, Kong, Smartbear](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [Aspirational competitor: Acto (significant growth since 2022 launch)](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)

### Content Publishing Process

  - [Zuplo committed to minimizing internal bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Will provide Git repo access for automated publishing](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Emphasis on fast indexing for programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)

### Domain Authority and Link Building

  - [fwd.digital to focus on DR 50-90 backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [Zuplo actively working on improving domain reputation](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)

### Collaboration and Celebration

  - [Agreed to set milestones and celebrate achievements](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Discussed potential in-person meetup after hitting significant targets](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to update contract with new 6-month term and upfront payment structure](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Adrian to align 2x traffic growth target with Zuplo CEO](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [fwd.digital team to be briefed on new performance expectations](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Zuplo to prepare Git repo access and streamline content approval process](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Both parties to finalize agreement before Zuplo's holiday break (starting Tuesday)](https://fathom.video/share/zCXd6LXW8xyxML77VLz-bZ5Q9gBVS2C7?tab=summary&timestamp=1019.0)
